controls.title: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
Ensure 'Minimum password length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
Ensure 'Account lockout duration' is set to '15 or more minute(s)'
Ensure 'Account lockout threshold' is set to '5 or fewer invalid logon attempt(s), but not 0'
Ensure 'Deny log on locally' to include 'Guests'
Ensure 'Accounts: Block Microsoft accounts' is set to 'Users can't add or log on with Microsoft accounts'
Ensure 'Accounts: Guest account status' is set to 'Disabled'
Ensure 'Network access: Shares that can be accessed anonymously' is set to 'None'
controls.category: Local Policies / Security Options / Network Access

controls.title: Ensure 'Microsoft Defender Antivirus' is enabled and signatures are current
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Domain: Firewall state' is set to 'On'
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Private: Firewall state' is set to 'On'
Ensure 'Windows Firewall: Public: Firewall state' is set to 'On'
Ensure multi-factor authentication is required for all users
Ensure 'Configure SMB v1 client driver' is set to 'Enabled: Disable driver (recommended)'
Ensure 'Turn off Autoplay' is set to 'Enabled: All Drives'
controls.category: Administrative Templates / Windows Components / AutoPlay Policies

controls.title: Ensure 'Allow enhanced PINs for startup' is set to 'Enabled' and BitLocker is configured
controls.category: Administrative Templates / Windows Components / BitLocker Drive Encryption

controls.title: Ensure 'Turn on Virtualization Based Security' is set to 'Enabled' and Secure Boot is active
controls.category: Administrative Templates / Windows Components / Device Guard

controls.title: Ensure 'Require user authentication for remote connections by using Network Level Authentication' is set to 'Enabled'
controls.category: Administrative Templates / Windows Components / Remote Desktop Services

controls.title: Ensure 'Configure Automatic Updates' is set to 'Enabled' and updates are current
controls.category: Administrative Templates / Windows Components / Windows Update
